title: Create Components With Same Value
titleCn: 创建价值相同的连通块

testcases.input: nums = [6,2,2,2,6], edges = [[0,1],[1,2],[1,3],[3,4]] Output: 2 Explanation: The above figure shows how we can delete the edges [0,1] and [3,4]. The created components are nodes [0], [1,2,3] and [4]. The sum of the values in each component equals 6. It can be proven that no better deletion exists, so the answer is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The above figure shows how we can delete the edges [0,1] and [3,4]. The created components are nodes [0], [1,2,3] and [4]. The sum of the values in each component equals 6. It can be proven that no better deletion exists, so the answer is 2.

testcases.input: nums = [2], edges = [] Output: 0 Explanation: There are no edges to be deleted.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no edges to be deleted.
